component.description: Apache Commons Exec is a library to reliably execute external processes from within the JVM.

component.name: logback-core

component.name: log4j-to-slf4j
component.description: Forwards the Log4j API calls to SLF4J. (Refer to the `log4j-slf4j[2]-impl` artifacts for forwarding SLF4J to the Log4j API.)

component.name: log4j-api
component.description: The logging API of the Log4j project. Library and application code can log through this API. It contains a simple built-in implementation (`SimpleLogger`) for trivial use cases. Production applications are recommended to use Log4j API in combination with a fully-fledged implementation, such as Log4j Core.

component.name: jul-to-slf4j
component.description: JUL to SLF4J bridge

component.name: jakarta.annotation-api
component.description: Jakarta Annotations API

component.name: snakeyaml
component.description: YAML 1.1 parser and emitter for Java

component.description: Library for introspecting types with full generic information including resolving of field and method types.

component.name: lombok

component.name: jackson-module-parameter-names
component.description: Add-on module for Jackson (https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson) to support introspection of method/constructor parameter names, without having to add explicit property name annotation.

component.description: Starter for using Tomcat as the embedded servlet container. Default servlet container starter used by spring-boot-starter-web

component.description: Core module of Micrometer containing instrumentation API and implementation

component.name: HdrHistogram
component.description: HdrHistogram supports the recording and analyzing sampled data value counts across a configurable integer value range with configurable value precision within the range. Value precision is expressed as the number of significant digits in the value recording, and provides control over value quantization behavior across the value range and the subsequent value resolution at any given level.

component.name: LatencyUtils
component.description: LatencyUtils is a package that provides latency recording and reporting utilities.

component.name: flyway-core
component.description: Flyway: Database Migrations Made Easy.

component.name: jackson-dataformat-toml
component.description: Support for reading and writing TOML-encoded data via Jackson abstractions.

component.description: Add-on module to support JSR-310 (Java 8 Date & Time API) data types.

component.name: jackson-annotations
component.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

component.name: aspectjweaver
component.description: The AspectJ weaver applies aspects to Java classes. It can be used as a Java agent in order to apply load-time weaving (LTW) during class-loading and also contains the AspectJ runtime classes.

component.name: jakarta.servlet-api
component.description: Eclipse Enterprise for Java (EE4J) is an open source initiative to create standard APIs, implementations of those APIs, and technology compatibility kits for Java runtimes that enable development, deployment, and management of server-side and cloud-native applications.

component.name: hsqldb
component.description: HSQLDB - Lightweight 100% Java SQL Database Engine

license.name: HSQLDB License, a BSD open source license

component.name: jsoup
component.description: jsoup is a Java library that simplifies working with real-world HTML and XML. It offers an easy-to-use API for URL fetching, data parsing, extraction, and manipulation using DOM API methods, CSS, and xpath selectors. jsoup implements the WHATWG HTML5 specification, and parses HTML to the same DOM as modern browsers.

component.name: zxcvbn
component.description: This is a java port of zxcvbn, which is a JavaScript password strength generator.

component.name: xstream
component.description: XStream is a serialization library from Java objects to XML and back.

component.name: xpp3_min
component.description: MXP1 is a stable XmlPull parsing engine that is based on ideas from XPP and in particular XPP2 but completely revised and rewritten to take the best advantage of latest JIT JVMs such as Hotspot in JDK 1.4+.

license.name: Indiana University Extreme! Lab Software License, vesion 1.1.1

component.name: cglib-nodep
component.description: cglib is a powerful, high performance and quality Code Generation Library, It is used to extend JAVA classes and implements interfaces at runtime.

component.name: xml-resolver
component.description: xml-commons provides an Apache-hosted set of DOM, SAX, and JAXP interfaces for use in other xml-based projects. Our hope is that we can standardize on both a common version and packaging scheme for these critical XML standards interfaces to make the lives of both our developers and users easier.

component.name: jjwt
component.description: Sonatype helps open source projects to set up Maven repositories on https://oss.sonatype.org/

component.name: jackson-databind
component.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

component.name: jwks-rsa
component.description: JSON Web Key Set parser library

component.name: java-jwt
component.description: Java client library for the Auth0 platform

component.name: jackson-core
component.description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON

component.name: guava
component.description: Guava is a suite of core and expanded libraries that include utility classes, Google's collections, I/O classes, and much more.

component.name: failureaccess
component.description: Contains com.google.common.util.concurrent.internal.InternalFutureFailureAccess and InternalFutures. Most users will never need to use this artifact. Its classes are conceptually a part of Guava, but they're in this separate artifact so that Android libraries can use them without pulling in all of Guava (just as they can use ListenableFuture by depending on the listenablefuture artifact).

component.name: listenablefuture
component.description:
An empty artifact that Guava depends on to signal that it is providing ListenableFuture -- but is also available in a second "version" that contains com.google.common.util.concurrent.ListenableFuture class, without any other Guava classes. The idea is:
- If users want only ListenableFuture, they depend on listenablefuture-1.0.
- If users want all of Guava, they depend on guava, which, as of Guava 27.0, depends on listenablefuture-9999.0-empty-to-avoid-conflict-with-guava. The 9999.0-... version number is enough for some build systems (notably, Gradle) to select that empty artifact over the "real" listenablefuture-1.0 -- avoiding a conflict with the copy of ListenableFuture in guava itself. If users are using an older version of Guava or a build system other than Gradle, they may see class conflicts. If so, they can solve them by manually excluding the listenablefuture artifact or manually forcing their build systems to use 9999.0-....

component.name: jspecify
component.description: An artifact of well-named and well-specified annotations to power static analysis checks

component.name: error_prone_annotations
component.description: Error Prone is a static analysis tool for Java that catches common programming mistakes at compile-time.

component.name: j2objc-annotations
component.description: A set of annotations that provide additional information to the J2ObjC translator to modify the result of translation.

component.name: commons-io
component.description: The Apache Commons IO library contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters, file comparators, endian transformation classes, and much more.

component.name: commons-lang3
component.description: Apache Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang.

component.name: commons-text
component.description: Apache Commons Text is a set of utility functions and reusable components for processing and manipulating text in a Java environment.

component.name: jose4j
component.description: The jose.4.j library is a robust and easy to use open source implementation of JSON Web Token (JWT) and the JOSE specification suite (JWS, JWE, and JWK). It is written in Java and relies solely on the JCA APIs for cryptography. Please see https://bitbucket.org/b_c/jose4j/wiki/Home for more info, examples, etc..

component.name: bootstrap
component.description: WebJar for Bootstrap

component.name: jquery
component.description: WebJar for jQuery

component.name: webjars-locator-core
component.description: WebJar Locator Core functionality

component.name: classgraph
component.description: The uber-fast, ultra-lightweight classpath and module scanner for JVM languages.

component.name: jakarta.xml.bind-api
component.description: Jakarta XML Binding API

component.name: jakarta.activation-api
component.description: Jakarta Activation API 2.1 Specification

component.name: jaxb-impl
component.description: Old JAXB Runtime module. Contains sources required for runtime processing.

component.name: jaxb-core
component.description: Old JAXB Core module. Contains sources required by XJC, JXC and Runtime modules with dependencies.

component.name: angus-activation
component.description: Angus Activation Registries Implementation

component.name: json-smart
component.description: JSON (JavaScript Object Notation) is a lightweight data-interchange format. It is easy for humans to read and write. It is easy for machines to parse and generate. It is based on a subset of the JavaScript Programming Language, Standard ECMA-262 3rd Edition - December 1999. JSON is a text format that is completely language independent but uses conventions that are familiar to programmers of the C-family of languages, including C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, Perl, Python, and many others. These properties make JSON an ideal data-interchange language.

component.name: accessors-smart
component.description: Java reflect give poor performance on getter setter an constructor calls, accessors-smart use ASM to speed up those calls.

component.name: android-json
component.description: JSON (JavaScript Object Notation) is a lightweight data-interchange format. This is the org.json compatible Android implementation extracted from the Android SDK

component.name: spring-core
component.description: Spring Core

component.name: spring-jcl
component.description: Spring Commons Logging Bridge

component.name: wiremock-standalone
component.description: A web service test double for all occasions - standalone edition

component.name: spring-boot-properties-migrator
component.description: Spring Boot Properties Migrator

component.name: spring-boot
component.description: Spring Boot

component.name: spring-boot-configuration-metadata
component.description: Spring Boot Configuration Metadata
